description: Composition Black hooded sweatshirt made of 100% cotton, has drawstrings for the hood, printed branding on the chest, long sleeves with ribbed cuffs, pockets on the sides and a ribbed hem Fit Regular Wash care only hand wash gently Do not machine wash or use fabric softener Wash with like colours Wash and iron inside out Do not iron on motif/print/trims/logo adidas' cult following is a result of the label's sporty yet laidback aesthetic, demonstrating a trademark sturdiness and durability, without compromising on its stylish designs. High quality fabric meets street-style sport fashion in this slouchy sweatshirt from adidas. Style this with fitted denims to work a dusky palette for weekends. For an early morning game or jog, balance this with tonal tracks, your favourite tee and sport shoes. Model Statistics Product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
